style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">operation</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> { </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="41414be1-3f7f-44fc-9510-aa96a858b1eb">in ref</ac:inline-comment-marker></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">= DS_Views::ViewPalettes::CodeActionIdentifiers::</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">requirementDefAction</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">focusedButton</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">reqButton</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;   <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// the part <em>reqButton</em> is specified as the focused (default) button for the menu button</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">            }<br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">        </span>}<br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    }<br />}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4>Adding predefined buttons to custom or inherited button categories or menu buttons</h4><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">To add predefined buttons to custom or inherited button categories or menu buttons</span></p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="798a093a-2dfc-49f7-aa72-b127d3dfcc90"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Do one of the following:</span><ol><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">To create specific buttons, place the cursor within the body of the button category element.</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">To create submenu buttons for the menu button, place the cursor within the body of the menu button element.</span></li></ol></li><li data-uuid="e6838d37-0673-4e38-a635-39a9c3571768"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Declare a part usage, specify the element name, define it by <em>Button,</em> and then subset <em>abstractButtons</em>.</span></li><li data-uuid="dd93da71-8319-4ab0-a88c-0d5de5fbcf0a"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Within the body of the part, declare a perform action, define it by <em>DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Operations::OperationFromCode,</em> and subset <em>operation</em>. In the element's body, specify the <em>in </em>direction with the code action identifier based on the type of element you want the button to create.<br /></span><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="4e708d33-f72a-43a5-85a8-bcd1726056f7"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">You can find the needed code action identifier for the element kind you want the button to create in the <em>DS_Views::ViewPalettes::CodeActionIdentifiers </em>package. It looks like this:</span></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="af09b53e-7006-4b7c-ae25-54b51460f1c4"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> <u>requirementAction</u> : ScalarValues::</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">String</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-red,#ae2e24);">&quot;ADD_REQUIREMENT&quot;</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;   <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// the code action identifier for the requirement usage element button is <em>requirementAction</em></span></span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></li><li data-uuid="44da7ad2-4ae1-4e98-ad5c-c0420d6fe627"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="5416c1a6-5e95-48fb-ad8c-a91861db15b7"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Requirements View'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::bsv</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {  <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><br /></span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">    part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">baseViewPalette</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {    <br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">        part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">requirementsCategory</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">buttonCategories {</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">            part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">reqButtonMenu</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">ButtonsCategory</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">abstractButtons</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {    <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// menu button instance</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">reqButton</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">Button</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">abstractButtons</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {   <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// submenu button</span></span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                   </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">perform</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">action</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">: </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Operations::OperationFromCode</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">operation</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> { </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="38345dc7-a5b0-47d3-bb90-7229b88c26be">in ref</ac:inline-comment-marker></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">= DS_Views::ViewPalettes::CodeActionIdentifiers</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">::requirementAction</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">; </span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"><u>}</u> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// specifies <em>requirementAction</em> so that this button creates the requirement usage element</span><br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">reqDefButton</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">Button</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">abstractButtons</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {   <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// submenu button</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                   </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">perform</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">action</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">: </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Operations::OperationFromCode</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">operation</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> { </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="ce08b7e6-1ecd-439e-9711-69eda68855df">in ref</ac:inline-comment-marker></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">= DS_Views::ViewPalettes::CodeActionIdentifiers</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">::requirementDefAction</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"><u> }</u> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// specifies <em>requirementDefAction</em> so that this button creates the requirement definition element</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">focusedButton</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">reqButton</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">; </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">            }<br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">        </span>}<br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    }<br />}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4>Removing buttons from inherited button categories</h4><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">To remove buttons from inherited button categories</span></p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="902b8cc6-eecb-4f0c-9337-44500b21132b"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Place the cursor within the body of the element redefining <em>baseViewPalette.</em></span></li><li data-uuid="6bd2c65f-2884-4658-9f50-7d9e2052ae66"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Declare a part usage, specify the element name (optional), and then redefine the button you want to remove.<br /></span><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="3903535b-6e24-4815-9163-6cb18094d7f7"><ac:rich-text-body><p>See the buttons specified for each predefined button category in the <em>DS_Views::ViewPalettes </em>package. You can also find it in the <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Custom symbolic view definitions" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[General button categories table]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>. </p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></li><li data-uuid="0282f6df-90f4-4461-96ce-de99f9feadcf">Set the redefining button's multiplicity to zero.</li><li data-uuid="96196d77-079f-4f62-b2b1-c554ae6583f1"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="3cd28ca7-d84f-4290-9115-13b4b43631b0"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Requirements View'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::bsv</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {  <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><br /></span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">    part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">baseViewPalette</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {     <br /></span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">        <u>part</u></span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">selectionCategory</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {    <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// unnamed part redefines <em>selectionCategory </em>inherited via <em>baseViewPalette<br /></em></span></span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">            </span>// ------ predefined button:<br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">            </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> completeCoverageModeButton : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Palette::Button</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt; abstractButtons</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">            </span>// ------ modified button (instead of the notation above):<br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">            part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">completeCoverageModeButton</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> [</span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-green-bolder,#1f845a);">0</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">]</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// multiplicity for the button <em>completeCoverageModeButton </em>is set to zero to remove it <br /></span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">        }</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"><br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    }<br />}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h3>Managing custom templated buttons in button categories</h3><p>Instead of or in addition to using predefined buttons either by adding them to your custom or inherited button categories, you can also create your own custom buttons. For that, first, you need to create a template for the custom button, and then you can add it to a specific button category of the view palette.</p><h4>Creating templates for custom buttons</h4><p>The following procedure depicts how to create an element template using metadata to extend the requirement usage element with the needed attribute, where the requirement usage element is named <em>Software</em>. Then the template can be passed into the custom button specification using <em>metadataAccessExpression</em>.</p><p>To create templates for custom buttons</p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="0bf60361-15e1-4da8-b083-71df384cadc5"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Within the package containing the new symbolic view definition, d</span>eclare:<ol><li>A metadata definition element with the needed name and attributes.</li><li>A package element for the template.<ol><li>Within the template element, apply metadata to the element kind you want to extend and specify the element name.</li></ol></li></ol></li><li data-uuid="51d64110-b801-4fc6-b635-cfa8d960f032"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="4d851252-4084-4bd9-881c-43906052cabc"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Custom symbolic view definitions'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// template for a custom button <em>softwareRequirement</em>:</span></span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">metadata</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">Software</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {   </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// declared metadata definition with the needed attribute</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">verificationMethod</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> [</span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-green-bolder,#1f845a);">0</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">..*] : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">VerificationMethod</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;    </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">softwareReqTemplate</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {  </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// custom button template </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        <u>#</u></span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">Software</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">requirement</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">softwareRequirement</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;  </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// the metadata Software is applied to the requirement usage element extending it with a new name Software and a metadata attribute. The name softwareRequirement will be used for the perform action's element specification to pass the template to a button in a button category</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    }</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// template for a templated button <em>satisfy</em>:</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">SatisfyReqTemplate</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">use</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">case</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">useCase1</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">satisfy</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">requirement1</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">requirement</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">requirement1</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4>Adding custom templated buttons to custom or inherited button categories or menu buttons</h4><p>To add custom templated buttons to custom or inherited button categories or menu buttons</p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="206bc5d2-12d8-4dd9-941a-4f5f8e0e9135"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Do one of the following:</span><ol><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">To create specific buttons, place the cursor within the body of the button category element.</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">To create submenu buttons for the menu button, place the cursor within the body of the menu button element.</span></li></ol></li><li data-uuid="7f62bb4f-7972-4b21-a900-e7be766395af"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Declare a part usage, specify the element name, define it by <em>Button,</em> and then subset <em>abstractButtons</em>.</span></li><li data-uuid="6351dae3-0a87-45ea-a9fa-6785cb3c8a46">Within the body of the part, specify attributes for the custom templated button:<ol><li>Redefine the <em>label </em>attribute and specify the button name.</li><li>Redefine the <em>description </em>attribute and specify the button's tooltip.</li><li data-uuid="f9688175-47dd-4e78-b3b5-c533ec94516c">Redefine the <em>representation</em> attribute and specify how the element should be represented in a view.<ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="28d25ea4-9ad6-408e-8fcb-efe535ff78a7"><ac:rich-text-body><p>Available <em>representation</em> attribute value options:</p><ul><li><em>shape </em>- regular element symbol as a shape.</li><li><em>shapeOnBorder </em>- port or other directional feature representation.</li><li><em>path </em>- relationship element representation.</li><li><em>naryShape </em>- n-relationship element representation.</li></ul><p>Note:</p><ul><li>Relationships can be displayed as paths or n-ary shapes (e.g., <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="N-ary connection" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[connection]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>, <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Dependency" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[dependency]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>, <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="N-ary interface" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[interface]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>).</li><li>Ports or other directional features can be displayed as shapes or shapes on a shape's border.</li><li>Referential elements can be displayed as shapes or paths (e.g., <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Perform action" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[perform]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>, <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Exhibit state" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[exhibit]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>, <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Include use case" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[include]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>, <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Satisfy requirement" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[satisfy]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>, <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Assume constraint" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[assume]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>, <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Require constraint" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[require]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>, <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Assert constraint" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[assert]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>, <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Specifying requirement verification usages for verification case objective" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[verify]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>, <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Frame concern" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[frame]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>, <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Occurrences" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[event]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>, <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Rendering views basics" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[render]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>).</li><li>The attribute can only be applied to <em>OperationFromTemplate</em> buttons. The specified representation value is ignored if it is unapplicable to the templated element.</li></ul></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></li></ol></li><li data-uuid="8c22f25b-b810-4fa4-a18d-df3b363d6074"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Declare a perform action, define it by <em>DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Operations::OperationFromTemplate,</em> and subset <em>operation</em>. In the element's body, specify the <em>in</em> direction with the custom button's template path using <em><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="d40d3f19-b0de-4004-86f4-ec8dd47a2d91">metadataAccessExpression</ac:inline-comment-marker></em></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">.</span><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="1e790f45-acbd-4ae4-9804-3b003288f71f"><ac:rich-text-body><ul><li data-uuid="81793605-8ff4-4b65-8d61-6a3030ae223f">A <em>metadataAccessExpression</em> must be used for the <em>in </em>element. Its result must be exactly one templated element that you want to copy for the button.</li><li data-uuid="59a93276-a863-4109-a786-edc0afdbacc0"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Alternatively, you can also use metaclassification expressions, e.g., when the templated element is unnamed. The expression would be: <em>(</em></span><em><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">softwareReqTemplate meta KerML::Element).ownedElement</span></em></li></ul></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></li><li data-uuid="d50012bc-6004-41c4-9383-27816d47e32b"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="ea7bfedb-8e7a-4311-89bc-89384b2a61bc"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Custom symbolic view definitions'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">private</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">import</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Palette</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">::*;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Requirements View'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::bsv</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {  </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">baseViewPalette</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {   </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">requirementsCategory</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">buttonCategories</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">softwareButton</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">Button</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">abstractButtons</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> { </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// menu button instance </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                    </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">label</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-red,#ae2e24);">&quot;software requirement&quot;</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><u>;</u>  </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// specify the button name</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                    </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">description</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-red,#ae2e24);">&quot;software requirement&quot;</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><u>;</u>  </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// specify the button tooltip</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// the <em>representation</em> attribute not specified because the requirement element can only be represented as a shape</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// <em>OperationFromTemplate</em> specifies that the indicated button is templated; in specifies the created element, which is <em>softwareRequirement</em> (which also contains metadata) from the template <em>softwareReqTemplate</em>:</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                    </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">perform</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">action</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Operations::OperationFromTemplate</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">operation</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> { </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                        </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">in</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">ref</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">softwareReqTemplate::softwareRequirement</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">.</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">metadata</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><u>;</u> </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                    }   </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">satisfyPath</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">Button</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">abstractButtons</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">label</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-red,#ae2e24);">&quot;satisfy path&quot;</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                    </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">representation</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">representation::path</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;  </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// representation specified as 'path' (<em>satisfy </em>can be path or shape)</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">perform</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">action</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Operations::OperationFromTemplate</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> :&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">operation</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                        </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">in</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">ref</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> = (</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">SatisfyReqTemplate::useCase1</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">meta</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">KerML::Root::Element</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">).</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">ownedElement</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">as</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">SysML::Systems::SatisfyRequirementUsage</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                    }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">                }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">            }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">        }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">    }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">}</span></span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p><br /></p><p><br /></p>
